# CareerVivid

CareerVivid is your AI-powered co-pilot for the job search. It helps job seekers build standout resumes, track applications, prepare for interviews, create portfolios, and autofill job forms in seconds.

## Primary Pages

- Homepage: https://careervivid.app/
- Start for free: https://careervivid.app/signup
- Chrome extension guide: https://careervivid.app/extension-welcome
- Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/dmigeakdfokehlhigkhadglgoabceoag?utm_source=item-share-cb
- Pricing: https://careervivid.app/pricing
- Blog: https://careervivid.app/blog
- Contact: https://careervivid.app/contact

## Learning Courses

- Interactive course catalog: https://careervivid.app/learning
- AI Agent Builder Curriculum: https://careervivid.app/learning/ai-agent-curriculum
  - 10 modules and 58 lessons from LLM foundations to an AI agent portfolio project. The Foundations module is free to start.
- Coding Interview Patterns: https://careervivid.app/learning/coding-interview-patterns
  - 20 algorithm patterns, 60 lessons, visual step-through animations, and runnable JavaScript code labs. Currently free to access.

## What CareerVivid Does

- AI resume builder and resume tailoring
- Job application tracking
- Resume match scoring against target roles
- Mock interview preparation and feedback
- Portfolio and whiteboard workspace
- Chrome extension job capture and job application autofill
- iOS app: coming soon
- Android app: coming soon

## Audience

CareerVivid is built for students, new graduates, career changers, and job seekers who want one place to manage the job search.
